parameters.jsCode: const openaiResponse = $input.first().json; const aiResponse = openaiResponse.choices[0].message.content || ''; const prevNode = $('Build Context & Messages'); const prevData = prevNode.first().json; const userMessage = prevData.user_message || ''; const openaiApiKey = prevData.openai_api_key || ''; const collectionName = prevData.collection_name || ''; const companySlug = prevData.company_slug || ''; const qdrantHost = prevData.qdrant_host || ''; const deduplication = prevData.deduplication || null; const saveKeywords = ['ejemplo', 'asi deberias', 'responde asi', 'cuando pregunten', 'si alguien pregunta', 'recuerda que', 'importante', 'nuestro horario', 'nuestros precios', 'vendemos', 'ofrecemos', 'nuestro telefono', 'nuestra direccion', 'nuestro email', 'nuestra pagina', 'nuestro whatsapp']; const shouldSave = saveKeywords.some(kw => userMessage.toLowerCase().includes(kw)); const textToSave = 'EJEMPLO DE ENTRENAMIENTO\\n\\nUsuario: ' + userMessage + '\\n\\nRespuesta del asistente: ' + aiResponse; return { json: { company_slug: companySlug, collection_name: collectionName, openai_api_key: openaiApiKey, qdrant_host: qdrantHost, deduplication: deduplication, user_message: userMessage, ai_response: aiResponse, should_save: shouldSave, text_to_save: textToSave } };

const openaiResponse = $input.first().json; const aiResponse = openaiResponse.choices[0].message.content || ''; const prevNode = $('Build Context & Messages'); const prevData = prevNode.first().json; const userMessage = prevData.user_message || ''; const openaiApiKey = prevData.openai_api_key || ''; const collectionName = prevData.collection_name || ''; const companySlug = prevData.company_slug || ''; const qdrantHost = prevData.qdrant_host || ''; const deduplication = prevData.deduplication || null; const saveKeywords = ['ejemplo', 'asi deberias', 'responde asi', 'cuando pregunten', 'si alguien pregunta', 'recuerda que', 'importante', 'nuestro horario', 'nuestros precios', 'vendemos', 'ofrecemos', 'nuestro telefono', 'nuestra direccion', 'nuestro email', 'nuestra pagina', 'nuestro whatsapp']; const shouldSave = saveKeywords.some(kw => userMessage.toLowerCase().includes(kw)); const textToSave = 'EJEMPLO DE ENTRENAMIENTO\\n\\nUsuario: ' + userMessage + '\\n\\nRespuesta del asistente: ' + aiResponse; return { json: { company_slug: companySlug, collection_name: collectionName, openai_api_key: openaiApiKey, qdrant_host: qdrantHost, deduplication: deduplication, user_message: userMessage, ai_response: aiResponse, should_save: shouldSave, text_to_save: textToSave } };
